// docs/22 §3+#110: UI-IFRAME context — a browser. DOM lib, and NO plugin-typings so any figma.* reference is a compile error (the mirror of the main config's no-DOM rule). Since #110 the iframe UI IS the shared web/src app (one UI, no fork), so this verifies THAT entry is DOM-clean under the plugin's stricter no-plugin-typings lens — the guarantee that the shared UI can't smuggle a figma.* reference into the iframe context. PRISM3_HOST is the build-time define (declared in web/src/prism3-host.d.ts, picked up via the include).
